message:
test(e2e): Add comprehensive E2E test suite for performance optimizations

Add tests/perf_e2e.rs with 4 end-to-end tests:
1. e2e_full_optimization_chain - verifies all 3 optimizations work together
2. e2e_rollback_env_vars - tests CASS_F16_PRECONVERT, CASS_SIMD_DOT,
   CASS_PARALLEL_SEARCH rollback via env vars
3. e2e_parallel_search_with_filters - verifies filtering works with
   parallel search
4. e2e_performance_scaling - confirms sub-linear scaling (15x size
   increase yields only 2x time increase)

Tests use a 15k vector corpus to exercise parallel search threshold.
All tests include detailed logging for debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
